channel.title: Technology on Kraft Masonry
channel.description: Recent content in Technology on Kraft Masonry

item.title: Building This Site: Why I Chose Hugo in 2026
item.description: Every few years I rebuild my personal site from scratch and spend far too long justifying the choice of tool. This time the answer was Hugo — and the reasoning was simpler than I expected.

item.title: Implementing Dark Mode Without a Flash
item.description: The flash-of-wrong-theme problem has a simple solution that most tutorials skip. Here is the approach used in this theme.
